definition: national or regional applicable standards or guides concerning health and safety applicable during transportation of a specific product type

definition_ml.en: national or regional applicable standards or guides concerning health and safety applicable during transportation of a specific product type
definition_ml.de: auf einen spezifischen Produkttyp während des Transports anwendbare nationale oder regionale Normen oder Richtlinien bezüglich Gesundheit und Sicherheit

note: Depending on the type of transportation different regulations apply, such as ADR/RID/ADN, IMDG and ICAO/IATA. The relevant regulation to be applied may differ from country to country.

note_ml.en: Depending on the type of transportation different regulations apply, such as ADR/RID/ADN, IMDG and ICAO/IATA. The relevant regulation to be applied may differ from country to country.
note_ml.de: Abhängig von der Art des Transports kommen unterschiedliche Regulierungen zur Anwendung, wie zum Beispiel ADR/RID/ADN, IMDG und ICAO/ISTA. Die relevante Regulierung, die anzuwenden ist, kann von Staat zu Staat unterschiedlich sein.
